text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Cascadia Code, monospace

text.tspan: # [0:00] Narration: "OpenClaw connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord — and talks to LLMs on your
# behalf. That's a lot of power. Let's govern it."

# Narration: "Setup installs Node.js 22 and OpenClaw — all inside the overlay. Takes a minute."
sudo envpod vault openclaw set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
sudo envpod vault openclaw set OPENAI_API_KEY
# Narration: "Each key encrypted separately. The agent gets them at runtime — never sees them in
